title: narcissus conspicuus
intro: Narcissus conspicuus, also known as the Poet's Narcissus or Pheasant's Eye, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is known for its small, delicate white flowers with a yellow center and its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Narcissus conspicuus include its ability to act as a purgative and its potential use in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, as it contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Narcissus conspicuus, such as teas and tinctures, are used to promote overall health and well-being, and its health benefits include reducing stress and improving digestion.
